title: The Strange Boarder
writer: Edfrid A. Bingham, Will J. Payne
actors: Will Rogers, Irene Rich, Jimmy Rogers
plot: Honest Arizona rancher Sam Gardner, goes with his motherless son Billy to the city, where he is cheated out of ten thousand dollars by a band of crooks. Taking up residence in a boardinghouse where he meets Jane Ingraham, Sam deci...
